records.ety: [Gr. <?/ a coming in besides, <?/ episode; <?/ into, besides + <?/ a coming in, <?/ into + <?/ way, cf. Skr. sad to go: cf. F. pisode.]

defs: A separate incident, story, or action, introduced for the purpose of giving a greater variety to the events related; an incidental narrative, or digression, separable from the main subject, but naturally arising from it.
